metadata.description: Official tikin plugin for Claude Code — social-media data, media download, and analytics across TikTok, Douyin, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X, Xiaohongshu, and more, via tikin's unified REST API.

plugins.name: tikin-plugin
plugins.description: Social-media data for Claude via tikin. Download media and fetch posts, profiles, comments, search, trends, and analytics across TikTok, Douyin, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X, Threads, Xiaohongshu, and more — through tikin's unified REST API using your own tikin API key.
